prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The UK-Sweden Memorandum of Understanding for cooperation in research and innovation applies to England as it involves collaboration between the UK government and Sweden, addressing areas of science and innovation that impact UK entities, including those based in England.
